verdict_reason: This is precisely the kind of verse most at risk of trivialization (turning saṁsāric release into 'feeling better at work'). The engineering layer holds the line: the STRETCHED tag, the explicit 'Krishna is not promising fewer bad rollouts; he is naming saṁsāric release' disclaimer, the falsifiability clause that forecloses the wishful reading, and the counter-example that handles affective-flatness — all four guards work together to prevent trivialization. The analog offered (substrate-stability-across-cycles) is small and operational, not a claim that the engineer achieves padam anāmayam. The Sanskrit terms are preserved (janma-bandha, padam anāmayam, manīṣiṇaḥ) and not flattened to engineer-speak. Pass.
